name: Omelette
steps: Crack 2 eggs into a bowl and beat them well.
Add a pinch of salt and pepper.
Heat butter in a pan on medium flame.
Pour the egg mixture into the pan.
Let it set for 1–2 minutes, then fold in half.
Serve hot and enjoy!

name: Pancakes
steps: Mix 1 cup flour, 1 tbsp sugar, and 1 tsp baking powder in a bowl.
Add 1 egg and 1 cup milk. Mix until smooth.
Heat a buttered pan on medium flame.
Pour a ladle of batter and cook until bubbles form on top.
Flip and cook the other side for 1 minute.
Serve with honey or jam!

name: Tomato Rice
steps: Cook rice separately and keep it aside.
Heat oil in a pan. Add cumin seeds.
Add chopped onion and garlic. Fry until golden.
Add chopped tomatoes and cook until soft.
Mix in the cooked rice. Add salt to taste.
Stir well and serve hot!

name: Banana Milkshake
steps: Peel and slice 1 ripe banana.
Put banana, 1 cup milk, and 1 tsp sugar in a blender.
Blend for 30 seconds until smooth.
Pour into a glass and serve chilled!

name: Vegetable Fried Rice
steps: Cook rice and let it cool completely.
Heat oil in a pan. Add garlic and onion, fry for 1 minute.
Add chopped carrot and peas. Stir fry for 3 minutes.
Push veggies to the side and scramble the egg in the pan.
Add rice and soy sauce. Mix everything well.
Stir fry for 2 more minutes and serve!
